mapper.select:
select c.id as id, p.name as personName, o.id as persionOrgId, o.name as bmOrgName, c.name as name, c.type as type, c.register_date as registerDate, c.validity_end_date as validityEndDate, c.state as state from xm_person_certificate c left join xm_person p on c.person_id = p.id
left join sys_org o on p.org_id = o.id
left join xm_person_org po on p.id = po.person_id left join sys_org o on o.id = po.org_id
left join sys_org o on p.org_id = o.id
where c.is_delete = 0 and p.is_delete = 0 and o.is_delete = 0
and (o.id = #{orgId} or o.pids like concat('%[', #{orgId}, ']%'))
and o.org_type = #{orgType}
and c.type = #{type}

SELECT DISTINCT b.id AS id, a.id AS projectId, a.project_name AS projectName, b.person_id AS personId, p.name AS personName, '已结业' AS result, IF(a.train_way = 2 OR a.train_way = 4, (DATE_FORMAT((SELECT MAX(r.create_time) FROM xm_answer_report r WHERE a.id = r.project_id AND b.person_id = r.person_id AND r.type = 2 AND r.is_delete = 0 AND r.score >= a.pass_score), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S')), (DATE_FORMAT((SELECT MAX(r.create_time) FROM xm_project_person_study_record r WHERE r.is_delete = 0 AND r.person_id = b.person_id AND r.project_id = a.id), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%S'))) AS timeCompletion, CASE a.train_way WHEN 1 THEN '单体培训' WHEN 2 THEN '纯净考试' WHEN 3 THEN '训练组合' WHEN 4 THEN '全链路考核' ELSE '未知' END AS trainWayName, o.name AS dwOrgName, o2.name AS bmOrgName FROM xm_project a LEFT JOIN xm_person_course_relate b ON a.id = b.project_id LEFT JOIN xm_person p ON b.person_id = p.id LEFT JOIN sys_org o ON p.org_id = o.id LEFT JOIN xm_person_org po ON p.id = po.person_id AND po.is_default = 1 LEFT JOIN sys_org o2 ON po.org_id = o2.id WHERE a.is_delete = 0 AND b.is_delete = 0 AND b.is_sign = 3 AND (a.train_way IN (1,3) OR (a.train_way IN (2,4) AND EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM xm_answer_report c WHERE c.is_delete = 0 AND c.type = 2 AND c.score >= a.pass_score AND c.person_id = b.person_id AND c.project_id = a.id)))
AND p.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{personName}, '%')
AND a.project_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{projectName}, '%')
ORDER BY timeCompletion DESC
